'''Henry Thomas''' is an [[Wikipedia:Actor|actor]] and [[Wikipedia:Voice acting|voice artist]] who that narrated the abridged versions of the first three [[Star Wars: X-Wing (novel series)|''X-wing'' series]] audiobooks.<ref name="Xwing Series" /> Thomas is known for playing the starring role in the [[Wikipedia:E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial|''E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial'']].<ref name="ET" />

{{Bio-stub}}
